choices.text: Custom errors (0.8.4+): error InsufficientBalance(uint256 avail, uint256 req); revert InsufficientBalance(x, y). ~24 bytes vs. 200+ for strings. Typed args returned to client; cheaper bytecode.

CEI (Checks-Effects-Interactions): 1) require checks first, 2) update state (balances[msg.sender] -= amount), 3) external call last. State updated before external call prevents reentrant calls from seeing stale state.

questions.explanation: CEI pattern: state before external call.
